subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom radiating outward; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared boulevard
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it emerges from the bend, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing into the dusk

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the boulevard, rounding a gentle bend, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A tree-lined European old-town boulevard at deep dusk in the blue hour, a clear spring sky fading to indigo above rows of blossoming plane trees. The gently curving asphalt is edged with cobblestone gutters and flanked by pale stone facades whose windows are just lighting up. The boulevard bends softly to the left ahead, the curve briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane as vintage-style lamps flicker on. Blossom petals dust the road edges; beyond the lamps the street sinks into blue-grey darkness.

lighting.conditions: Deep-dusk blue hour with vintage street lamps warming up; dry roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare emerging from the leftward bend
lighting.shadows: Long soft blue shadows from trees and lamps lengthening across cobble-edged asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Residual indigo sky glow with warm lamp pools under blossoming trees; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming bloom, lens-flare starbursts, and washout against the dusk

aesthetics.composition: Boulevard curving left with the bend near mid-frame, oncoming glare dominating upper-center as it emerges, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Blue-hour indigo and slate stone with warm lamp amber and pale blossom, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious amid quiet old-town dusk
aesthetics.patterns: Rows of plane trees and cobble gutter lines sliding past, dashed lane markings

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the curving boulevard, gentle lateral swing into the bend, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and cobble-edged markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a tree-lined old-town boulevard

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the dusk boulevard at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint around a gentle leftward bend
Vehicle rounds the bend; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the blue-hour view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, boulevard becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the dusk boulevard at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing around a gentle bend
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear past the blossoming trees
segments.camera: Forward tracking with a gentle swing into the bend

segments.description: Rounding the bend as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare against the indigo dusk
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Lateral swing through the bend, then straightening onto the road ahead

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, boulevard regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a tree-lined old-town boulevard at blue-hour dusk, ego headlights and warming lamps over cobble-edged asphalt while a faint glow appears around a gentle leftward bend. By 0:01 the vehicle enters the bend and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, lens-flare starbursts, and bloom against the indigo dusk. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the boulevard reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on dry asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. A faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing, soft evening birdsong and distant cafe murmur in the old town; no music or speech.
